overlay_notes: Costinot-Werning optimal robot tax: 2.7% ad-valorem × auto_cost 15% → automation_tax_rate = 0.0040 of the saved compensation bill
Compute-pool parity tax: effective rate 0.27 (Windfall capital ETR 26.7%) vs the 0.05 post-TCJA status quo
Federal VAT: 5% on a consumption base of two-thirds of value added, eroding with the standing income withdrawal (no behavioral response modeled)

grounding.debt_stock: ≈ 6.6 extra years of the FY2025 federal deficit — an improvement against what CBO projects
grounding.fed_deficit_flow: ≈ 0.8× annual Social Security outlays, every year — an improvement against what CBO projects
grounding.real_gdp: ≈ 1.5 years of normal (~2%/yr) real growth, arriving all at once
